M365_RUNTIME_URL.description: Base URL for the standalone M365 Graph runtime service launched from the installed pack (preferred path).

M365_TENANT_ID.description: Microsoft Entra tenant ID used by the standalone Graph runtime.

M365_CLIENT_ID.description: Microsoft Entra application (client) ID used by the standalone Graph runtime.

M365_AUTH_MODE.description: Microsoft auth flow. Username/password is forbidden.

M365_REDIRECT_URI.description: Local loopback redirect URI for auth_code_pkce.

M365_APP_ONLY_CLIENT_SECRET_REF.description: Reference (e.g. keychain item name) for the app-only client secret. Never the secret itself.

M365_APP_ONLY_CERTIFICATE_REF.description: Reference for the app-only certificate. Never the private key bytes.

M365_ENCRYPTED_PACK_LOCAL_ALLOWED.description: true/false; only true if approved policy allows pack-local encrypted storage.

M365_GRANTED_SCOPES.description: Comma-separated list of granted Microsoft Graph permission names.

M365_OPS_ADAPTER_URL.description: Legacy ops-adapter URL. Deprecated; prefer M365_RUNTIME_URL.

M365_SERVICE_JWT_HS256_SECRET.description: Legacy shared HS256 secret used by UCP to mint caller bearer tokens for the M365 ops-adapter service.

M365_SERVICE_ACTOR_UPN.description: Operator or service principal UPN asserted into the caller bearer token.

M365_SERVICE_JWT_ISSUER.description: Optional JWT issuer claim for the caller bearer token.

M365_SERVICE_JWT_AUDIENCE.description: Optional JWT audience claim for the caller bearer token.
